name: BERSERKR.Tables.OdinMinorFavour
description: Small acts of guidance from the Allfather.

results.text: Odin's Wisdom: Vision of insight. Advantage on your next Wits Test.
Huginn's Message: Raven delivers knowledge. GM reveals a minor secret.
Muninn's Memory: Glimpse of past glory. Regain d4 HP.
Odin's Favour: Your next attack is an automatic success.
Guiding Eye: +2 to next Guile Test. Removes Blindness.
Runic Empowerment: Gain a random Rune.
Odin's Endurance: +1 to next Fortitude Test.
Blessing of the Allfather: Restores vitality. Heal d6 HP.
Odin's Ravens: Advantage on next Guile Test.
Warding Vision: Half damage next time you are hit.
Freyja's Light: +2 to next attack or defence.
Odin's Gaze: DR of next Wits Test is reduced by -2.
Odin's Disfavour: Misfortune on weapon. Next attack has disadvantage.
Thor's Punishment: Shockwave deals d6 damage.
Frigg's Curse: Wave of sadness. Next failure makes you weep uncontrollably.
Heimdall's Watch: Stealth attempt fails due to bright spotlight.
Vidar's Grip: Held in place. Cannot move next round.
Freyja's Anger: Dominated by fear. Test Wits DR14 or scream.
Tyr's Judgement: Tyr watches next battle. Judging you.
Odin's Blind Eye: Apply Blindness for 24 hours.
Thor's Reckoning: Next Might Test DR increases by 4.
Frigg's Withering Hand: Healing restored is halved next time.
Vidar's Retribution: Automatically knocked prone when attacked.
Odin's Displeasure: Role d6: 1-3 equipment fire, 4-5 lose d100 Trinkets, 6 both.

name: BERSERKR.Tables.OdinModerateFavour
description: Powerful blessings when the gods take notice.

results.text: Odin's Ravens: Huginn and Muninn come to spy for you.
Frigg's Protection: Next defence is an automatic success.
Freyja's Inspiration: Allies gain +1 to attacks next round.
Vidar's Endurance: +2 to all Tests during next holmgang.
Thor's Empowerment: Next melee attack deals additional d6 lightning damage.
Heimdall's Vigilance: Avoid next ambush or trap automatically.
Odin's Blessing: Reroll the next failed Test.
Tyr's Battle Cry: All allies gain +2 to attacks next round.
Freyja's Healing: Heal d8 HP and remove all conditions.
Vidar's Retribution: Next successful attack deals double damage.
Odin's Guidance: GM reveals an enemy weakness or mission secret.
Thor's Thunder: Next successful attack stuns all nearby enemies.

name: BERSERKR.Tables.OdinModerateWrath
description: Divine punishment for those who stray.

results.text: Thor's Strike: Test Swift DR12 or take 2d6 lightning damage.
Odin's Take Backs: One precious belonging is permanently destroyed.
Vidar's Vengeance: Enemies deal +2 damage to you in the next battle.
Frigg's Sorrow: Test Fortitude DR14 or lament next enemy like family.
Heimdall's Judgement: Instantly lost, even in familiar places.
Tyr's Demand: Lose d10 HP or suffer -2 to all Tests for 24h.
Odin's Blind Eye: Next Guile Test fails automatically. Apply Blindness.
Thor's Rage: Stunned by a lightning bolt from the sky.
Vidar's Grip: Automatic failure on all defences in next battle.
Heimdall's Eyes: Spotlight reveals you; horn sounds with each step.
Frigg's Curse: You can only heal while in Asgard.
Tyr's Judgement: Challenge next god seen to holmgang (-2 to all Tests).

name: BERSERKR.Tables.OdinSevereFavour
description: The Allfather's direct intervention in your saga.

results.text: Odin's Gift: Permanent Rune inscribed on equipment. Weapon +1 dmg or Armour +1 negation.
Heimdall's Horn: GJALLARHORN sounds! d4 Einherjar join you in the next battle.
Thor's Thunderstrike: 3d6 damage to ALL enemies in battle.
Freyja's Valkyries: d4 Valkyries descend to fight by your side.
Odin's Intervention: Each player gains automatic success on all attacks next round.
Vidar's Vengeance: Choose an enemy; they suffer 5d6 damage immediately.
Tyr's Divine Trial: Weapon deals double damage for the entire next battle.
Freyja's Blessing: Heal ALL party members 2d6 HP and remove all conditions.
Odin's Insight: Odin lends a Legendary Weapon or Item for the next mission.
Heimdall's Vision: Advantage on all attacks and defences in next battle.
Frigg's Shield: Immunity to one condition for the entire group next battle.
Odin's Runic Mastery: Inscribe THREE random Runes into your equipment.
Odin's Deception: Compelled to attack your allies for d4 rounds.
Frigg's Weeping: Group cursed; no HP can be restored for 24 hours.
Vidar's Retribution: Group suffers 3d6 damage and falls prone.
Heimdall's Silence: Cannot use Runes or Features in next battle.
Odin's Cleanse: Lose the ability to use Fates during next battle.
Thor's Fury: Thor descends personally, demanding a test of strength.
Frigg's Judgement: Frigg arrives to weigh your actions with sorrow.
Vidar's Hunt: Marked for divine retribution by Vidar.
Heimdall's Wrath: Challenges group to a test of vigilance.
Tyr's Trial by Combat: Duel Tyr or suffer dire consequences.
Freyja's Vengeance: Freyja arrives seeking vengeance for your deeds.
Odin's Judgement: Odin personally delivers punishment and challenges your worth.
